problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
